title: Lazaretto
why_this_song: Lazaretto by Jack White (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 3 times; first heard in: "When I say nothing, I say everything"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Damn, I have no time left, time is lost"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Como en madera y yeso"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Como en madera y yeso"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Como en madera y yeso"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And even God herself has fewer plans than me
But she never helps me out with my scams for free, though

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nothing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nothing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "time" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "time" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: My veins are blue and connected
They threw me down in a lazaretto
Any way that I can, oh

exercises.prompt_en: "Lazaretto" was released in 2014. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Lazaretto" foi lançada em 2014. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Lazaretto" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Lazaretto" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
